query:
-- Books where authors string has a birth year but no death year (format: "Name, 1883-")
SELECT gutenbergId, title, authors
FROM books
WHERE authors REGEXP ', [0-9]{4}-[^0-9]'
   OR authors REGEXP ', [0-9]{4}-$'
LIMIT 20;

LIMIT 20;
